sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Streamex Corp. (NASDAQ: STEX) to Provide Corporate Update
feed.summary: Streamex Corp. (NASDAQ: STEX) is hosting a corporate update webinar on December 16, 2025, to discuss its 2025 achievements, the GLDY launch, and its 2026 strategic roadmap. The company expanded its team and partnerships, strengthened its capital position, and acquired a 9.9% equity interest in Empress Royalty Corp. Streamex plans to launch yield-bearing tokenized commodity products like silver, royalties/streams, copper, and oil & gas in the coming years.

feed.title: B. Riley Analyst Craig Ellis Remains Bullish On Onto Innovation Inc. (ONTO)
feed.summary: B. Riley analyst Craig Ellis reiterated a Buy rating on Onto Innovation Inc. (ONTO), increasing the price target from $173 to $180 after the company completed its acquisition of Semilab International's key product lines. This acquisition is expected to boost Q4 revenue and diluted EPS, with the acquired product lines projected to generate $120 million in sales in 2026. Onto Innovation, a provider of high-performance control metrology and defect inspection systems, is also highlighted as one of the 13 Best Nanotechnology Stocks to Buy Now.

feed.title: Manulife Financial (NYSE:MFC) Hits New 12-Month High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Manulife Financial (NYSE:MFC) has reached a new 52-week high of $35.63, with Wall Street analysts giving it a consensus "Buy" rating and an average target price of $49.50. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, exceeding EPS estimates, and recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.44 per share, resulting in a 5.0% annualized yield. Institutional investors are actively increasing their positions in MFC, with 52.56% of the stock owned by institutions and hedge funds.

feed.title: MRNA: Jefferies Initiates Coverage with Hold Rating and $30 PT
feed.summary: Jefferies has initiated coverage on Moderna (MRNA) with a "Hold" rating and set a price target of $30.00 USD. This new rating comes amid varied perspectives from other analysts, with recent updates ranging from "Underperform" to "Overweight" ratings and price target adjustments. Moderna, a commercial-stage biotech, has an average target price of $36.86 from 20 analysts, suggesting an upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Charles Schwab reports $40.4 billion in core net new assets for November
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) announced $40.4 billion in core net new assets for November 2025, marking a 40% increase year-over-year and bringing year-to-date core net new assets to $440.3 billion. The company also saw its total client assets reach $11.83 trillion, opened 365,000 new brokerage accounts in November, and experienced robust client engagement with 8.46 million daily average trades. Other recent developments include a $2 billion senior notes issuance, a quarterly cash dividend, and the acquisition of Forge Global Holdings.

feed.title: AbbVie Slipped Below 50-Day SMA Last Week: How to Play the Stock
feed.summary: AbbVie's stock (ABBV) recently fell below its 50-day simple moving average, indicating short-term selling pressure despite a strong long-term trend above its 200-day SMA. This article analyzes AbbVie's strengths, such as the success of new drugs Skyrizi and Rinvoq and its robust pipelines in oncology and neuroscience, against weaknesses like Humira's patent expiration and struggling aesthetics sales. The author concludes that investors should remain invested, citing AbbVie's robust pipeline, strong revenue growth expectations for 2025, and reasonable valuation.

feed.title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market Update + Chipotle Mexican Grill Rings NYSE Bell Amid Expansion
feed.summary: The NYSE provides a daily pre-market update, noting a mixed Dow Jones and record highs for the S&P 500 and Russell 2000. Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) is celebrating the opening of its 4,000th restaurant, with its CEO ringing the NYSE opening bell, while MSG Entertainment (NYSE: MSGE) will ring the closing bell with the Harlem Globetrotters. Analysts view the broadening rally and the Federal Reserve's recent rate cut as positive signs for the bull market, encouraging moves into cyclical stocks.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains An Overweight Rating On 3M Company (MMM)
feed.summary: Barclays has maintained an Overweight rating on 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) and increased its price target from $180 to $190, citing the company's strong performance and raised earnings guidance. This positive outlook comes despite Deutsche Bank lowering its price objective and downgrading MMM shares due to shrunken valuation gaps with rivals. 3M reported adjusted earnings of $2.19 per share, exceeding Wall Street expectations, and raised its 2025 adjusted earnings guidance.

feed.title: Mizuho Securities Sticks to Their Buy Rating for Alphabet Class A (GOOGL)
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities maintained a Buy rating for Alphabet Class A (GOOGL) with a price target of $365.00, noting the company's strong financial performance with quarterly revenue of $102.35 billion and a net profit of $34.98 billion. This positive outlook is supported by other analysts like Piper Sandler, though Cantor Fitzgerald recently reiterated a Hold rating.

feed.title: Constellation wins energy award for Microsoft nuclear power deal
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: CEG) received the "Energy Deal of the Year" award for its 20-year power purchase agreement with Microsoft. This agreement enabled the restart of the Crane Clean Energy Center, a nuclear facility in Pennsylvania, to provide 835 megawatts of carbon-free energy for Microsoft's data centers. The project is expected to create over 3,000 jobs and contribute significantly to Pennsylvania's GDP and tax revenue.

feed.title: Citi Keeps A Sell Rating On Intel Corporation (INTC)
feed.summary: Citi analyst Christopher Danely reaffirmed a Sell rating and $29 price target on Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC) due to anticipated market shifts. Despite a brief surge, Intel's stock saw a drop after reports suggested a potential partnership with Apple for its lowest-end M processor by 2027. Intel also announced its decision to retain its networking and communications unit (NEX), citing an improved financial standing and better integration opportunities, despite earlier considerations for divestiture.

feed.title: State Street Corp Has $803.86 Million Stock Holdings in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. $ARE
feed.summary: State Street Corp increased its stake in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE:ARE) by 1.7% in Q2, bringing its total holdings to 10,873,745 shares valued at $803.86 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in ARE, which saw its stock open at $45.56, while analysts have set an average price target of $72.43 with a "Hold" rating. The company recently announced a share buyback program of $500 million and a quarterly dividend of $0.72 per share, despite missing Q3 earnings estimates.

The company currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $88.90, and recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.79 per share, annualizing to $3.16.

These notable insider buying activities, encompassing millions of dollars in investments, signal a strong belief in the future growth potential of these companies, even as markets approach all-time highs. Such insider confidence can be an encouraging indicator for potential investors amidst market uncertainties.

feed.title: Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) grows $40.4B net new assets, client assets $11.83T
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation released its Monthly Activity Report for November 2025, detailing significant growth. Core net new assets increased by 40% year-over-year to $40.4 billion, contributing to a year-to-date total of $440.3 billion. Total client assets reached $11.83 trillion, marking a 15% rise from November 2024.

feed.title: Merck Receives Positive EU CHMP Opinion for Expanded Use of WINREVAIR™ (sotatercept) in Adults with Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension (PAH, WHO* Group 1 Pulmonary Hypertension)
feed.summary: Merck announced that the European Medicines Agency’s CHMP has recommended the approval of an expanded indication for WINREVAIR (sotatercept) in combination with other PAH therapies for adults with WHO Functional Class II, III, and IV PAH. This recommendation is based on the Phase 3 ZENITH study, which showed a significant reduction in major morbidity and mortality outcomes. The broader indication aims to extend the use of WINREVAIR beyond improving exercise capacity.

feed.title: State Street Corp Has $847.52 Million Stock Position in Camden Property Trust $CPT

feed.title: Matador Resources (NYSE:MTDR) Given New $70.00 Price Target at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho analysts have raised their price target for Matador Resources (NYSE:MTDR) to $70.00 from $67.00, reiterating an "outperform" rating and implying a potential upside of 56.01%. feed.title: Hervé Hoppenot resigns from Incyte’s board of directors
feed.summary: Hervé Hoppenot has resigned from Incyte Corporation's Board of Directors, effective immediately, after serving as Chairman and CEO since 2014. Under his leadership, Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) has achieved a strong financial position, with more cash than debt and a 38.8% stock price gain over the last six months. This transition follows a previously announced plan and coincides with recent positive clinical data for Incyte's experimental drug INCA033989, leading to increased price targets from several analyst firms.

feed.title: Fifth Third announces board changes as Almodovar joins, Harvey retires
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp announced that Priscilla Almodovar will join its Board of Directors, while Thomas H. Harvey will retire, effective January 7, 2026. Almodovar brings extensive leadership experience from Fannie Mae and JPMorgan Chase. The bank (NASDAQ:FITB) showed strong performance in Q3 2025, exceeding earnings and revenue forecasts, and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share.

feed.title: Duke Energy announces leadership changes as CAO plans retirement
feed.summary: Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) announced leadership changes, including the retirement of its Senior Vice President, Chief Accounting Officer, and Controller, Cindy Lee, after 24 years of service. Abby Motsinger will succeed Lee, while other finance organization roles are re-aligned. Duke Energy, a large utility company with significant dividend history, also faces near-term regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Mizuho Raises Price Target for MTDR to $70, Maintains Outperform Rating | MTDR Stock News

This update reflects continued positive expectations for the company's future performance, despite some recent varying analyst ratings and price target adjustments. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $59.52 for MTDR, implying an upside of 32.60% from its current price.

The company, a significant oil and gas producer primarily in the Permian Basin and Eagle Ford, has received varied, but generally stable, analyst ratings recently.

feed.title: Alphabet (GOOG) Stock Today: Google Class C Shares Face AI Rival Pressure, New Antitrust Risks, and a Waymo Recall — What Investors Are Watching (Dec. 12, 2025)
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C stock (GOOG) is navigating intensified AI competition, new antitrust risks in the EU and U.S., and a Waymo vehicle recall. Investors are closely scrutinizing the company's "full-stack AI" strategy, including Gemini integration, Google Cloud's growth, and the commercialization of TPUs, balanced against regulatory pressures and the market's increasing demand for clear AI spending returns. The long-term narrative for Alphabet hinges on its ability to maintain Search resilience, scale Cloud and AI infrastructure effectively, and manage regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Chevron To Rally Around 37%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
feed.summary: This article compiles ten top analyst forecasts for Friday, covering various companies like Roku, uniQure, Rivian Automotive, Guardant Health, Kazia Therapeutics, Broadcom, PayPal Holdings, Ciena Corp, Chevron Corp, and American Superconductor. Analysts have issued upgrades, downgrades, and price target changes, reflecting their updated outlooks on these stocks. Noteworthy movements include a significant price target increase for Roku by Jefferies and a downgrade for PayPal by Baird.

The article also details recent insider selling activities and institutional investor movements in Phillips 66 stock.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Stock (NCLH) Surges on Analyst Target Hike and Fed Tailwinds — Latest News, Forecasts, and Key Risks (Dec. 12, 2025)
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NCLH) stock surged by 6-7% on December 12, 2025, driven by a Federal Reserve rate-cut narrative supporting consumer spending and a Mizuho analyst price target increase to $32. While the stock saw a rally, bears still point to concerns about Caribbean capacity and yield pressure, despite the company reporting record Q3 2025 revenue. The mixed analyst sentiment and NCLH's significant debt burden make it a battleground stock with a wide range of price targets.

feed.title: State Street Corp Acquires 354,340 Shares of Hormel Foods Corporation $HRL

This brings their total ownership to 28,068,704 shares, valued at $849,078,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their stakes, and Hormel Foods recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2925 per share.

feed.title: Nvidia storms Ethernet switch market in challenge to Cisco, Arista
feed.summary: Nvidia has rapidly emerged as a significant player in the Ethernet switch market, challenging established leaders like Cisco and Arista Networks, with its Spectrum-X offerings driving a 167.7% year-over-year revenue increase in Q3 to $1 billion. This surge has given Nvidia 11.6% of the data center Ethernet switch market, fueled by the exploding demand for AI infrastructure. While Arista continues to grow its market share, Cisco's data center segment growth is slower, and the company is navigating competitive pressures and integrations in the market.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Appoints Priscilla Almodovar to Board
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) has appointed Priscilla Almodovar to its Board of Directors, effective January 7, 2026, succeeding Thomas H. Harvey. Almodovar brings over 35 years of leadership experience, including her role as CEO of Fannie Mae, and will serve on key committees. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates FITB as "Outperform" due to strong financials and growth initiatives, despite some revenue and cash flow challenges.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Announces Redemption of Debentures
feed.summary: Wells Fargo announced its plan to redeem Floating Rate Junior Subordinated Deferrable Interest Debentures due January 15, 2027, with the redemption date set for January 15, 2026. This action will remove restrictions on repurchasing certain preferred stock, potentially increasing the company's financial flexibility. Analysts currently rate WFC as a "Buy" with a $104.00 price target, and Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, considers WFC an "Outperform" due to strong earnings and strategic growth opportunities.

feed.title: Mizuho Raises Chevron (CVX) Price Target to $206, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Nitin Kumar has raised the price target for Chevron (CVX) to $206 from $204, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating, reflecting a continued positive outlook for the energy company. This adjustment follows several other recent analyst activities and ratings updates for Chevron, with a consensus Wall Street average target price of $172.71 and an overall "Outperform" recommendation from brokerage firms. However, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value of $141.65.

feed.title: Stifel raises Monster Beverage stock price target to $82 on growth outlook
feed.summary: Stifel has increased its price target on Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) to $82.00 from $78.00, maintaining a Buy rating and citing expectations for "advantaged growth" in 2026, continued international expansion, and solid price realization. This move aligns with other analysts who have recently raised their price targets for Monster Beverage, indicating a positive outlook for the company's growth prospects. Monster is highlighted as Stifel's "top pick in Energy Drinks" due to its strong base business growth, international contribution, and innovation pipeline.

feed.title: Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII): Is the Defense Contractor Still Undervalued After Its Strong 2024 Rally?
feed.summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) has seen a significant rally in 2024, with its stock up 74% year-to-date and 19% in the last three months, reaching a fresh high of $326.72. While analysts have a consensus target of $285.8, Simply Wall St's narrative suggests the stock is still modestly undervalued with a fair value near $332, supported by long-dated defense cash flows. However, the article also highlights potential risks from execution issues on Navy programs and shifts in Pentagon priorities.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Solutions: Valuation Check After New Fintech Upgrades, Xceptor Partnership and Strategy Hire
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) is undergoing significant fintech enhancements, including AWS migration and a new Xceptor partnership, while sitting on a $231.5 share price. The company appears undervalued with a fair value near $269, despite trading at a higher P/E ratio than its peers. This analysis evaluates its growth prospects and risks, highlighting it as a potential fintech compounder.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Holdings Declares Special Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Holdings (OPY) announced a special cash dividend of $1.00 per share for its Class A and Class B common stock. This dividend, payable on January 9, 2026, to shareholders recorded by December 26, 2025, totals approximately $10.5 million and signifies the company's improved financial standing and commitment to rewarding loyal shareholders. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates OPY as Neutral, noting solid financial performance despite cash flow challenges, a bearish technical trend, yet an undervalued valuation.

feed.title: The Manufacturers Life Insurance Company Sells 40,282 Shares of The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX

feed.title: Treasurer of the State of North Carolina Boosts Position in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: The Treasurer of the State of North Carolina significantly increased its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) in Q2, purchasing an additional 412,534 shares to bring its total to 1,618,790 shares, valued at approximately $257.9 million. This makes P&G the 16th largest position in the Treasurer's portfolio. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has an average "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $171.40 from market analysts.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson MedTech EP leader Bodner explains recent ASC boost for PFA
feed.summary: Michael Bodner, Johnson & Johnson MedTech Company Group Chair of Electrophysiology and Neurovascular, discusses the significance of CMS's recent decision to add AFib-treating cardiac catheter ablation procedures to its ASC-covered list. This move, effective January 1, 2026, is expected to significantly benefit PFA technology leaders like Johnson & Johnson MedTech, Medtronic, and Boston Scientific by expanding access and providing more cost-effective care in outpatient settings. Bodner highlights how J&J MedTech's integrated portfolio, including the Varipulse platform, is well-positioned to support safe and efficient arrhythmia care in ASCs, projecting substantial growth in cardiac ablation procedures within these facilities.

feed.title: Incyte (NASDAQ: INCY) announces board change as ex-CEO Hervé Hoppenot steps down
feed.summary: Incyte (Nasdaq: INCY) announced the resignation of Hervé Hoppenot from its Board of Directors, effective immediately, following a planned transition period where he served as an advisor to the CEO. Hoppenot, who joined Incyte in 2014 and previously held the roles of Chairman and CEO, is recognized for his leadership in growing Incyte into a leading biopharmaceutical company. The company is committed to discovering, developing, and commercializing proprietary therapeutics in Oncology and Inflammation & Autoimmunity.
